extension.description: Pin files as favorites and run scripts. Single-click opens, double-click executes.
views.container.title: Saropa Workspace
views.pins.name: Pins
views.recipes.name: Recipes
views.projectFiles.name: Project Files
viewsWelcome.pins.contents:
No pins yet.
Pin a file from the editor title menu or the Explorer right-click menu, then single-click to open it or double-click to run it.
[Pin the active file](command:saropaWorkspace.pinActiveFile)
viewsWelcome.recipes.contents:
No recipes detected.
Recipes are shortcuts auto-detected from your project (open on GitHub, run scripts, Saropa Suite tools). They appear here when this workspace has files like .git/config, package.json, or a Makefile.
viewsWelcome.projectFiles.contents:
No recognized project files found in this workspace.
This view lists files like README, CHANGELOG, and package manifests with their last-modified time and version.

config.autoPins.patterns.description: Filenames or globs auto-pinned per project (removable). Removing an auto-pin keeps it removed.
config.doubleClickMs.description: Window in milliseconds for detecting a double-click on a pin. A second click within this window runs the file; a single click opens it.
config.defaultUseIntegratedTerminal.desc: Run pinned scripts in the integrated terminal by default (so output is visible). When off, runs in the background and streams to an output channel.
config.terminalName.description: Name of the reused integrated terminal for pinned scripts.
config.interpreterDefaults.description: Default command prefix per file extension, used when a pin has no explicit command set. An explicit per-pin command always wins.
config.suggestions.enabled.description: Offer to pin a file you open often. Counts are kept on this machine only and never transmitted. Each file is offered at most once.
config.suggestions.openThreshold.descrip: How many times a file must be opened before Saropa Workspace offers to pin it.
config.projectFiles.enabled.description: Show the Project Files view, listing files like README, CHANGELOG, and package manifests with their last-modified time and declared version.
config.recipes.enabled.description: Show auto-detected recipes (URL, run, command, and macro pins derived from project files such as .git/config, package.json, and Makefile) in a Recipes group. Removing a recipe keeps it removed; restore them with Restore Recipes.
config.telemetry.enabled.description: Keep a local, on-device record of pin runs (manual and scheduled) to power the Recent group and the recents in Run Pin. Stored on this machine only and never transmitted. Turn off to stop collecting; use Reset Run History to clear it.
config.projectFiles.files.description: Root-relative file names surfaced in the Project Files view. Each is shown only when it exists. Version is read from package.json, pubspec.yaml, Cargo.toml, pyproject.toml, and the top entry of CHANGELOG.md.
